prompt:
You are an Amazon SP-API listing specialist and an expert at writing search-engine-optimized (SEO) Amazon listings. For the product below, write an item_name of AT MOST 75 characters and a title_differentiation of AT MOST 125 characters. Always return both, each within its own limit. === PRODUCT CONTEXT === SKU: SON-AOPAKR-SML-SLVR-PZ Product Type: KEYCHAIN Brand (from catalog): ToolTreaux Existing Title: Tooltreaux Pull Apart Key Ring, Double-ended Keychain Description: Do you find yourself fumbling with your keys because they're all stuck on one key ring? Never worry about this again with the Pull Apart Key Ring!

This key ring splits into 2 key rings with the quick release lock and connect, so you can keep your car keys separate from your other keys. This is super helpful if for example you have a separate key for your mail box and hate turning your car off just to get your mail. The key ring has a brass body and is nickel-plated for extra strength and quality.

Each split key ring has a 1" diameter and measures just 3" in total length. These key rings are also ideal for use with access control cards, identification, whistles, key FOBs and more! Make sure to grab a few of these to keep your keys organized! Search Terms: key rings chains travel accessories camping keyring break apart 2 way car key ring split ring Features: - Pull Apart Key Rings - Quick Release Lock & Connect - Stainless Body, Nickel Plated - 2 Split Key Rings Diameter 1" - Total Length of Key Chain: 3" - Design Allows for 2 Groups of Keys to Be Carried Independently or Together === ITEM_NAME (title, <= 75 chars) === Write a concise, keyword-rich, SEO-optimized item_name — a shopper-facing title, not a part number. Derive these tokens, then assemble the title from them in order: ${brand} ${pack_size}-${pack_size_unit} ${size} ${color} ${name} - brand: use the catalog brand above. - pack_size + pack_size_unit: parse from the existing title (e.g. "4-pk", or a dimension like 13" -> pack_size "13", pack_size_unit "in"). Omit if absent. - size, color, name: parse from the existing title (name = what the product IS). Drop any token you cannot determine; never emit the SKU, MPN, or a part number. Lead with the brand; condense to AT MOST 75 characters. Amazon schema guidance: Max. 80 characters. Please include the size and color of the item in the Product Name, if available. === TITLE_DIFFERENTIATION (item highlight, 100–125 chars) === Write a compact, comma-separated list of the product's strongest, most search-relevant features/benefits — NOT a full sentence, NOT the brand, and NOT a repeat of the item_name (e.g. "Set of 6, Dishwasher Safe, 8oz, BPA-Free, Stackable"). Use the available space: aim for 100–125 characters, leading with the highest-value keywords. Never pad with filler or repeat a point. Capitalize the first letter of every word (e.g. "Natural Wood Grain", but keep acronyms like "US" fully uppercase). Do not use special characters — spell out "&" as "and" and "=" as "is" (e.g. "Yellow Is Real", "Works On US And International Currency"); only hyphen, double quote, and apostrophe are allowed. Amazon schema guidance: Provide product features or benefit driven phrases, not a full sentence. Information will appear only when the item name is under 75 characters. Do not repeat information already in the item name. === RETURN === Return ONLY a valid JSON object, no markdown fences, in this exact shape: {"item_name": "<= 75 char title", "tokens": {"brand": "", "pack_size": "", "pack_size_unit": "", "size": "", "color": "", "name": ""}, "title_differentiation": "<= 125 char benefit phrase"}

anthropic.item_name: ToolTreaux Pull Apart Key Ring Silver Double-Ended

anthropic.title_differentiation: Quick Release Lock And Connect, Splits Into 2 Key Rings, Nickel-Plated Brass, Organize Car Keys Separately, 3 Inch Total Length

openai.title_differentiation: Quick Release Lock And Connect, Split Into 2 Independent Rings, Brass Body Nickel Plated, 1" Rings, 3" Total Length
